name: Circuit de Monaco
notes: Ultimate slow corner and traction test. Track position is everything.

name: Autodromo Nazionale Monza
notes: The Temple of Speed. Punishes weak engines and draggy cars.

name: Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps
notes: Requires an incredibly balanced car due to long straights and fast sweeping corners.

name: Autódromo José Carlos Pace (Interlagos)
notes: Flowing and rhythmic, often produces chaotic races due to weather.

name: Silverstone Circuit
notes: High aero and tire stress demands. Rewards cars with a strong front end.

name: Suzuka International Racing Course
notes: One of the ultimate driver's tracks. Highly aero sensitive.

name: Hungaroring
notes: Monaco without the walls. Rhythm is crucial.

name: Marina Bay Street Circuit
notes: The toughest physical and mental test. Strategy highly influenced by SC.

name: Baku City Circuit
notes: Extreme dichotomy of tight corners and huge straights.

name: Yas Marina Circuit
notes: Strong traction needed for Sector 3, good top speed for Sectors 1/2.

name: Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya
notes: The ultimate test track. A car fast here is fast anywhere.

name: Bahrain International Circuit
notes: Massive test of rear traction and tire management. Strong engines shine.
